title: bellis pusilla
intro: Bellis pusilla, also known as dwarf dandelion or lesser dandelion, is a small flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it a potential remedy for skin issues and wounds. The health benefits of Bellis pusilla may include reducing fever and alleviating gastrointestinal problems, such as diarrhea and constipation. Bellis pusilla can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be dried and used in infusions or as a topical application.
